'''"Giant" Flog''' was a gladiator owned by [[Kesivo]].

==Biography==
Kesivo purchased his prize gladiator during a trading mission in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]]. Flog survived in the gladiator arena for two years. He wielded a huge flail consisting of a craggy hunk of rock on a chain. His origins remained unknown, and he had little command over any language. Rumors abounded that Flog was the result of an occult summoning by a demon, or a crude amalgamation of the parts of dead gladiators.<ref name="Giant Flog DB">{{DB|character|giantflog|Giant Flog}}</ref>

When [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] entered [[The Cauldron]] to challenge the Rattatakan gladiators, Flog joined the fight. Flog killed a [[Cauldron wampa]] that was about to attack Ventress. They then engaged, she severed Flog's flail, sending it flying through the air to smash into the viewing box housing Kesivo. Flog's benefactor was [[Death/Legends|killed]] instantly. Enraged by this, Flog charged at Ventress only to get felled by her twin [[lightsaber]]s.
